dungeons.name: Beginner Cave
dungeons.desc: A damp cave where novice adventurers begin their journey. Basic monsters lurk in the shadows.

dungeons.name: Fire Tower
dungeons.desc: A blazing tower wreathed in eternal flame. Fire-type words grant massive bonuses here.

dungeons.name: Merchant Guild
dungeons.desc: The bustling center of commerce. Master commerce words to unlock merchant bonuses.
